> **Sensitive disclosure:** If this describes an active exploit or exposes customer data, do **not** file a public issue. Follow your organization's private security disclosure process instead.

## Summary

<!-- Concise description of the security concern. -->

## Severity (initial assessment)

- [ ] Critical - remote code execution, auth bypass, mass data exposure
- [ ] High - significant privilege escalation or sensitive data leak
- [ ] Medium - limited impact or requires non-trivial preconditions
- [ ] Low - defense-in-depth improvement

## Affected component

<!-- Service, endpoint, dependency, infrastructure layer. -->

## Attack scenario

<!-- Who can exploit this, with what access, and what is the impact? -->

2. Steps:
3. Impact:
